testcase.name: test_create_hotel_with_lat_lon

failure.message: AssertionError: latitude not persisted on POST. body keys: ['_id', 'name', 'description', 'address', 'city', 'country', 'star_rating', 'amenities', 'images', 'phone', 'email', 'operator_id', 'operator_name', 'average_rating', 'total_ratings', 'total_rooms', 'available_rooms', 'status', 'is_active', 'created_at', 'updated_at'] assert None == 4.0511 + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd6b1a98c0c0>('latitude') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd6b1a98c0c0> = {'_id': '0b309901-716c-40e3-bfd2-73f7f3042f5d', 'address': '1 Test St', 'amenities': [], 'available_rooms': 0, ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter225_pickup_and_hotel_coords.py:120: in test_create_hotel_with_lat_lon assert data.get("latitude") == 4.0511, f"latitude not persisted on POST. body keys: {list(data.keys())}" E AssertionError: latitude not persisted on POST. body keys: ['_id', 'name', 'description', 'address', 'city', 'country', 'star_rating', 'amenities', 'images', 'phone', 'email', 'operator_id', 'operator_name', 'average_rating', 'total_ratings', 'total_rooms', 'available_rooms', 'status', 'is_active', 'created_at', 'updated_at'] E assert None == 4.0511 E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd6b1a98c0c0>('latitude') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd6b1a98c0c0> = {'_id': '0b309901-716c-40e3-bfd2-73f7f3042f5d', 'address': '1 Test St', 'amenities': [], 'available_rooms': 0, ...}.get
